feature_title: Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: SSE Proxy Route (KH-15)

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: SSE Proxy Route (KH-15)

## Document Status
- Last updated: 2026-03-02
- Feature: SSE proxy route bypassing Next.js buffering
- Scope: Deferred — not adopting
- Implementation state: Deferred

## Origin

Upstream: `chevron7locked/kima-hub` v1.5.0 → v1.6.0, item KH-15.

## What the Upstream Change Does

Created `frontend/app/api/events/route.ts` as a dedicated route handler that bypasses Next.js response buffering for Server-Sent Events endpoints.

## Deferral Reasoning

Soundspan does not use SSE. Real-time features are WebSocket-based:
- Listen Together: `backend/src/services/listenTogetherSocket.ts`
- Social presence: `backend/src/services/socialPresenceEvents.ts`
- Progress reporting: polling intervals

No SSE endpoint exists that needs proxying.

## Revisit Criteria

- SSE endpoints added for enrichment progress streaming
- SSE endpoints added for scan progress or download notifications
- Architecture change from WebSocket to SSE for any real-time feature
